svg.title: LithePG v1.0 app-icon PNG dimension gate evidence
svg.desc: Visual receipt for release gate hardening requiring high-resolution PNG app-icon payloads to include valid IHDR dimensions.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: LithePG release gate: AppIcon PNG dimensions
2026-06-23 06:41 EDT · local cron evidence · no external publication

g.text: RED: test_package_verify rejected a fake ic10 PNG-signature-only payload
GREEN: package_verify + v10_release_gate now parse PNG IHDR dimensions
ic10 requires ≥1024×1024; ic14 requires ≥512×512 for PNG payloads
✓ swift build && swift test (127 tests / 20 suites)
Docker dogfood gate not run this tick: docker command missing in cron environment.
